title: Any link_design equivalent or alternative?
body:
### Link to page

https://github.com/vortexgpgpu/vortex/blob/master/hw/syn/yosys/synth.sh#L31

### Build number

_No response_

### Issue

Hi, I saw a yosys file using the following
```
link_design  -top module
```
But yosys currently doesn't have this command, what is the updated alternative? I cannot find any clue in documentation.

Best,
redpanda.

### Expected

_No response_
